project_common.outline_style: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

context.role: Real-time display of current score during gameplay
context.usage_scenario: Always visible during gameplay, updates every frame as score increases at 10 points per second, flashes white (optional) at 100-point milestones

visual_specification.texture: monospace pixel font, crisp pixel rendering

animation.description: Score value updates every frame, optional white flash for 0.1 seconds when score reaches multiples of 100

visual_specification.details: Font size 16px, monospace pixel font, 5 digits with leading zeros (00000-99999), right-aligned at top right with 10px margin, character width 10px each, optional milestone flash effect

relationships.shared_with: Same font style and color as game_over_screen text elements
relationships.differences_from: game_over_screen has multiple text sizes (12px, 16px, 24px), score_display is fixed 16px and always visible during play

explicit_negations: no additional colors beyond #535353 and optional #FFFFFF flash
no smooth font rendering (pixel font only)
no animation between number changes (instant update)
